title: TITAN pipeline parameters
description: Parameter schema for TITAN, a Nextflow DSL2 eukaryotic genome annotation pipeline.

output_dir.description: TITAN output directory. Required for production runs.

new_assembly.description: Target genome assembly to annotate, FASTA. Required for production runs.

previous_assembly.description: Reference assembly used by Liftoff, FASTA. Required for production runs.

previous_annotations.description: GFF3 annotation matching previous_assembly. Required for production runs.

RNAseq_samplesheet.description: CSV with sampleID,SRA_or_FASTQ,library_layout columns. Required for production runs.

RNAseq_data_dir.description: Directory containing local RNA-seq FASTQ/FASTA files referenced by sampleID.

protein_samplesheet.description: CSV with organism,filename protein evidence rows. Required for production runs.

egapx_paramfile.description: EGAPx YAML input file. Required for production runs.

publish_intermediates.description: Publish intermediate/debug outputs under output_dir/intermediate_files and output_dir/tmp.

egapx_cpus.description: CPU override for the TITAN EGAPx wrapper process.

run_eggnog_mapper.description: Run eggNOG-mapper on the AEGIS-derived protein FASTAs.

eggnog_data_dir.description: Directory containing the external eggNOG-mapper database files. Required when run_eggnog_mapper is true.

eggnog_mapper_tax_scope.description: Optional eggNOG taxonomic scope passed to emapper.py.

run_helixer.description: Run Helixer ab initio gene prediction on the EDTA soft-masked genome. Its GFF3 is also passed to AEGIS as optional merge evidence.

helixer_model_dir.description: Directory containing pre-fetched Helixer models (via scripts/download_helixer_model.sh). Required when run_helixer is true.

helixer_model.description: Helixer lineage model to use for prediction.

helixer_use_gpu.description: Pass --nv to the Helixer container to use a GPU. Requires a GPU visible on the executing node; CPU is used otherwise.

run_interproscan.description: Run InterProScan functional annotation on the AEGIS-derived protein FASTAs, in parallel with Diamond2GO and eggNOG-mapper.

interproscan_data_dir.description: Directory containing the pre-fetched InterProScan member database data (via scripts/download_interproscan_data.sh), bind-mounted to /opt/interproscan/data. Required when run_interproscan is true.

run_busco.description: Run BUSCO gene-set completeness (protein mode) on the final AEGIS main protein set, as part of quality_report.

busco_lineage.description: BUSCO lineage dataset name (e.g. eudicotyledons_odb12.2) to score the final protein set against.

busco_data_dir.description: Directory containing the pre-fetched BUSCO lineage dataset (via `busco --download <lineage> --download_path <dir>`), used offline. Required when run_busco is true.

run_trnascan.description: Run tRNAscan-SE on the target genome to annotate tRNA genes under additional_annotations/ncrna/trna.

run_rfam.description: Run Infernal cmsearch against offline Rfam covariance models to annotate ncRNA families under additional_annotations/ncrna/rfam.

rfam_data_dir.description: Directory containing pre-fetched and cmpress-indexed Rfam.cm plus Rfam.clanin. Required when run_rfam is true.

run_lncrna.description: Build preliminary lncRNA candidates from transcript assemblies after coding/ncRNA overlap filters.

lncrna_min_length.description: Minimum transcript length retained as a preliminary lncRNA candidate.

lncrna_min_fpkm.description: Reserved expression threshold for the stricter FEELnc/CPC2/CPAT phase; recorded for provenance.

lncrna_require_cpat_model.description: Require cpat_model_dir with CPAT-plant files when run_lncrna is true.

cpat_model_dir.description: Directory containing CPAT-plant model files Plant_Hexamer.tsv and Plant.logit.RData. Defaults to bundled Plant-LncPipe model files; a Vitis-specific model is preferred when available.

cpat_model_flavour.description: CPAT model provenance label, e.g. plant_lncpipe or vitis_trained.

cpat_plant_cutoff.description: Coding probability cutoff documented for CPAT-plant; CP >= cutoff is coding.

run_mikado.description: Run Mikado as a parallel final GFF3 annotation source using the same annotation evidence inputs as AEGIS.

run_transdecoder.description: Run TransDecoder on Mikado prepared transcripts before Mikado serialise/pick. Effective only when run_mikado is true.

mikado_scoring.description: Mikado scoring file or bundled scoring profile, e.g. plant.yaml.

run_flair.description: Run FLAIR on long-read RNA-seq samples and pass merged isoforms as optional evidence to AEGIS and Mikado.

egapx_revision.description: EGAPx runner Git tag or revision to fetch when egapx_runner_dir is not provided.

egapx_executor.description: Executor passed to the nested EGAPx runner.

egapx_python.description: Python executable used by the host-side EGAPx runner.

egapx_data_version.description: EGAPx data version passed to the nested EGAPx runner.

egapx_runner_dir.description: Optional local EGAPx runner directory. False downloads the pinned revision.

egapx_local_cache_dir.description: Optional persistent EGAPx local cache directory.

egapx_config_dir.description: Optional EGAPx executor config directory passed to the nested EGAPx runner.

aegis_gene_id_prefix.description: Gene ID prefix applied by 'aegis rename' when building the final merged annotation (e.g. Vitvi).

ena_download_timeout_seconds.description: Per-request timeout for ENA/SRA FASTQ downloads.

ena_max_download_attempts.description: Maximum ENA/SRA download attempts per file.

ena_retry_wait_seconds.description: Wait time between ENA/SRA download retries.

ena_process_max_retries.description: Maximum Nextflow process retries for ENA/SRA preparation tasks.

ena_verify_md5.description: Verify ENA MD5 checksums when metadata provides them.

STAR_genomeSAindexNbases.description: STAR --genomeSAindexNbases. Use false to derive it from genome size.

STAR_sjdbGTFfile.description: Optional GTF file passed to STAR genomeGenerate with --sjdbGTFfile, or false to disable.
